document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Bauko

_meta.source: Office of the Provincial Assessor — Bauko GR FORM No. 1 (Office Order, April 24, 2025)
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Official schedule: 3 commercial (C-1..C-3) + 7 residential (R-1..R-7). Adds R-6 and R-7 vs the earlier draft; all 2027 values shifted DOWN.
Each R class lists specific sitios/corridors per barangay — see the location_description field for the canonical text.
Mirrors BAUKO_CLASSIFICATIONS in lib/bauko.js so the editor's class chips and the printed legend stay in sync.

items.location_description: Commercial lots along Provincial and National Roads of Abatan.
Commercial lots along National Road of Mabaay, Sinto, Sadsadan, and Poblacion; and inner lots of Abatan.

Commercial lots along all-weather roads of Mount Data, Monamon Sur, Monamon Norte, Banao, Otucan Sur, Otucan Norte, Bila, Guinzadan Sur, Guinzadan Central, Guinzadan Norte, Tapapan, Leseb, Lagawa, Bagnen Oriente, Bagnen Proper, Mayag, and Balintaugan; and inner lots of all barangays except Abatan.

Abatan: Junction to Mr. Cue Building to Tadian; Junction to Mr. Palpal building beside Christ the King Church going to Bontoc; Junction to Mr. Golocan residential house going to Caguimongan. Mabaay: Junction to Caltex.

Abatan: Mr. Cue to Jomar Hardware at Malupa; Mr. Golocan house going to Tabatab waitingshed (Baguio direction); Mr. Palpal building near Christ the King Church to Abatan/Poblacion boundary (Bontoc direction). Guinzadan Central: Pek-as to Tongtongbawi. Guinzadan Sur: Tontongbawi to Pesnadan. Mabaay: Junction to Odidiyan; Junction to Welcome Arc (Sabangan direction). Monamon Sur: Boga. Sadsadan: Karatula to Junction (Balicanao direction). Sinto: along National Road.

Abatan: Tabatab Waiting shed to Guinzadan Central/Abatan boundary; Mr. Daytaca Hardware at Malupa to Bauko/Tadian boundary; Junction to Kiwangen. Banao: Andanum to MPSPC. Bila: Pak-as to Napu. Guinzadan Central: Abatan/Guinzadan Central boundary to Pek-as. Guinzadan Sur: Pesnadan to Guinzadan Sur/Tapapan boundary. Mabaay: Caltex to Sadsadan/Mabaay boundary. Monamon Sur: Mt. Data cliff to Loreta Benos house; Natonglob to Monamon Proper; sitio Lukib. Mount Data: all lots along National Road. Otucan Sur: Kisop Bridge to Pak-as. Poblacion: all lots along National Road. Sadsadan: Sadsadan/Mabaay boundary to Karatula. Sinto: road going to Mankayan.

Abatan: all lots not described in higher tiers. Banao: MPSPC to Banao School; Junction (Mr. Isican) to Guinzadan Norte boundary. Bila: Napu to Otucan Norte boundary + all other lots. Guinzadan Central: sitio Lalasi to bridge + all other lots. Guinzadan Norte: bridge to sitio Lingayo. Guinzadan Sur: all other lots. Leseb: Tapapan boundary to Lawlawitan; Lawlawitan to Mabaay boundary. Mabaay: Welcome Arc to Sabangan boundary. Mayag: Kiwangen to Doling. Monamon Norte: sitio Bansa. Monamon Sur: Benos house to sitio Binaka; Little Hill to Guisguisaan; sitio Pactil. Mount Data: all other lots not described. Otucan Sur: Kapayawan Bridge to Dawaic bridge + Kapayawan lots. Poblacion: along Municipal Road from Municipal Hall + all other lots not described. Sadsadan: Junction (Balicanao direction) to Monamon Sur boundary (National Road). Sinto: all other lots not mentioned. Tapapan: Guinzadan Sur boundary to Junction (Lebao direction).

Banao: Banao school to Lagawa boundary + all other lots. Guinzadan Norte: Lingayo to Banao boundary. Lagawa: all other lots not described. Mabaay: sitio Banata to sitio Deppas. Mayag: Doling to Mayag. Monamon Norte: sitio Tamog-o + sitio Suyo. Monamon Sur: sitio Binaka to sitio Suyo; sitio Pactil to sitio Sil-ac to Guisguisaan; sitio Taptapoc. Otucan Sur: all other lots not described. Sadsadan: sitio Mabilig + Longon. Tapapan: Junction (Lebao) to Leseb boundary + Tapapan Diversion Road.

Lagawa: Banao boundary to turning point near Mr. Banaken house. Mabaay: sitio Deppas to sitio Gao-gao. Mayag: all other lots not described. Monamon Norte: sitio Suyo to Tipunan. Monamon Sur: sitio Sengyew + Asbiagan. Sadsadan: sitio Cuba. Tapapan: Letang.

Lagawa: turning point to Adadogan and Lao-ingan; turning point to 1 km toward Coputan. Leseb: Lawlawitan to Leseb Elementary School + all other lots not described. Mabaay: sitio Gao-gao to sitio Beas + all other lots. Monamon Norte: Tipunan to sitio Pitpitan; sitio Nabilngan to sitio Pangao + all other lots. Otucan Norte: all lots. Otucan Sur: Pak-as to Kapayawan Bridge (Bontoc direction). Sadsadan: sitio Bato + Sumey-ang.
Bagnen Oriente: 200 m below the school to steps going up to Mt. Polis. Lagawa: 1 km to turning point to Coputan. Monamon Sur: sitio Dodoan. Sadsadan: sitio Balicanao.

Bagnen Oriente: Sabangan boundary to 200 m below the school; Mt. Polis steps to Bagnen Proper boundary. Bagnen Proper: 200 m below the school to Junction. Lagawa: all other lots not described. Monamon Sur: sitio Bebe + all other lots not described. Sadsadan: sitio Am-am + sitio Salin + all other lots not mentioned.

Bagnen Oriente: all lots not described in higher tiers. Bagnen Proper: Bagnen Oriente boundary to 200 m below the school; Junction to 300 m on Abatan-Bagnen Road; 300 m to Poblacion (Bauko) boundary; Junction to Balintaugan boundary; all other lots not described.
